title: Excalibur | It Takes a Pillage support
description: This resource pack redraws the It Takes a pillage continuation mod in the Excalibur style
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [It Takes a Pillage](https://modrinth.com/mod/it-takes-a-pillage-continuation) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**This pack is not completely finished.** Things that remain to be done:
- Retexture of Legioner
- Biome dependant textures
- Entity texture variations

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur
- Izofar - Creator of It Takes a Pillage
- Faboslav - Creator of It Takes a Pillage Continuation
